summary: Tested 6 new features: Calculation Methodology, SG Calculator, Rental Yield Optimizer, Holdings Performance, Export Data, and Tax Analysis ATO tooltips. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Calculation Methodology page loads at /calculation-methodology
Calculation Methodology has 6 tabs: Income Tax, CGT, Franking, Super, Property, Company
Calculation Methodology shows 2024-25 tax brackets table with Stage 3 rates (16%, 30%, 37%, 45%)
Calculation Methodology has ATO external links with target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer
SG Calculator page loads at /sg-calculator
SG Calculator shows 11.5% rate for 2024-25
SG Calculator Add Employee button works - adds new employee cards
SG Calculator Remove Employee button works - removes employee cards
SG Calculator shows quarterly breakdown (Q1-Q4)
SG Calculator shows due dates (28 Oct, 28 Jan, 28 Apr, 28 Jul)
SG Calculator shows SG by Employee chart
SG Calculator shows SG Rate & Cost Projection chart
Rental Yield Optimizer page loads at /rental-yield-optimizer
Rental Yield Optimizer shows Gross Yield (4.28%), Net Yield (-2.05%), Tax Benefit ($6,460)
Rental Yield Optimizer has Optimize Returns section with sliders
Rental Yield Optimizer has Rent Increase, Expense Reduction, Principal Paydown sliders
Rental Yield Optimizer shows Optimized Results section
Rental Yield Optimizer shows Recommendations section with actionable advice
Holdings Performance page loads at /holdings-performance
Holdings Performance shows ASX 200 benchmark comparison chart
Holdings Performance shows S&P 500 benchmark option
Holdings Performance shows Sector Allocation pie chart
Holdings Performance shows Best & Worst Performers
Holdings Performance shows Portfolio Metrics (Holdings, Sectors, Avg Dividend, Top Holding)
Holdings Performance shows Concentration Risk metrics
Export Data page loads at /export
Export Data shows section selection (Family Members, Share Portfolio, Budget, Properties, Trust, Company)
Export Data has Generic CSV export option
Export Data has Xero Format export option
Export Data has MYOB Format export option
Export Data shows Importing to Xero instructions
Export Data shows Importing to MYOB instructions
Tax Analysis page loads at /tax-analysis
Tax Analysis has View Methodology button that navigates to /calculation-methodology
Tax Analysis has 5 ATO info tooltip icons
Navigation sidebar shows Yield Optimizer under Property group
Navigation sidebar shows Performance under Shares group
Navigation sidebar shows SG Calculator under Calculators group
Navigation sidebar shows Export Data under Reports group
Navigation sidebar shows Methodology under Reports group
All navigation links work correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
ATO external links correctly use target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer for security
Navigation sidebar correctly organized with new items in appropriate groups
Tax Analysis View Methodology button correctly links to /calculation-methodology
SG Calculator correctly shows 11.5% rate for 2024-25 and quarterly due dates
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values from App.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6 new features tested and working: 1) Calculation Methodology with ATO references and 2024-25 tax brackets, 2) SG Calculator with 11.5% rate and employee management, 3) Rental Yield Optimizer with sliders and recommendations, 4) Holdings Performance with ASX 200/S&P 500 benchmarks and sector allocation, 5) Export Data with CSV/Xero/MYOB formats, 6) Tax Analysis with ATO tooltips and View Methodology button. All navigation items visible in sidebar.

components: 6 tabs (Income Tax, CGT, Franking, Super, Property, Company)
2024-25 tax brackets table with Stage 3 rates
ATO external links with proper security attributes
Due dates (28 Oct, 28 Jan, 28 Apr, 28 Jul)
Gross Yield, Net Yield, Tax Benefit display
Optimize Returns sliders (Rent Increase, Expense Reduction, Principal Paydown)
Section selection (Family Members, Share Portfolio, Budget, Properties, Trust, Company)
Import instructions for Xero and MYOB

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - stored in React Context and localStorage. No backend database connection.
